title: A request to increase the size of the text box widget in automations for emails or notifications

posts.author: talm (Tal Macmil)
posts.cookedHtml:
A request to increase the size of the text box widget in automations for emails or notifications.
Currently, when setting up automations in monday.com to send emails or notifications, the size of the text box itself is fixed and cannot be expanded. This becomes problematic when writing longer messages, as the text box remains small, making it difficult to view or edit the full content without excessive scrolling.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d put this if Feature Requests instead of discussions.
